summary: Completed frontend testing of club name truncation fix across GuessIt football prediction app. The main agent successfully replaced 'truncate' CSS classes with 'line-clamp-2 break-words leading-tight' across 9 files to allow team names to wrap to 2 lines instead of being cut with '...'

design_issues.issue: Player names in live match updates still show truncation (e.g., '12' Vinicius Jr...') on mobile view
Long competition names like 'Primera Division' and 'UEFA Champions League' still truncated on mobile (390px width)

passed_tests: Homepage match cards display team names without truncation on desktop
My Predictions page shows full team names with line-clamp-2 implementation (10 elements found)
Match Detail page displays team names correctly without ellipsis
Saved Matches page loads without truncation issues
No old 'truncate' CSS classes found in main team name elements
Team names in prediction cards wrap properly to 2 lines
Desktop responsive view (1920px) shows team names correctly
Login and authentication flow works correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: The main truncation fix is working correctly for team names in match cards and prediction pages. Minor remaining issues are with live match player names and competition names on mobile view, but these are low priority as they don't affect the core team name display functionality that was requested to be fixed.
